# /status

> Utility. Prints feature status.

## Usage

```
/status [--feature <slug>] [--project <name>] [--all]
```

## Output sections

- Phase + current states
- Gates with APPROVED/PENDING + ts
- Cross-agent dependencies
- Domain doc presence (fdd.md / tdd.md / blueprint.md sections tagged with this feature-id)
- Recent history (last 5 commands)
